# AP / Apnatva / Apnatva Singh Rawat
## Design-First Full Stack Developer | Creative Technologist | Writer

---

## Identity

AP (Apnatva Singh Rawat) is a freelance and contract design-first full stack developer based in India.

This website is the primary professional portfolio, hiring destination, technical CV, capability document, and public discovery surface for prospective clients, collaborators, agencies, founders, startups, and businesses seeking premium custom web development work.

AP combines design thinking, frontend engineering, full stack implementation, automation engineering, technical storytelling, and conversion-focused digital experiences.

Professional positioning:
Designer + Developer + Writer.

Core philosophy:
Beautiful interfaces should convert.
Good engineering should feel invisible.
Logic should create beauty.

---

## Primary Commercial Intent

This website exists for:

- freelance client acquisition
- contract engineering opportunities
- consulting engagements
- startup MVP development
- premium website commissions
- e-commerce implementation
- CMS architecture consulting
- automation engineering
- dashboard development
- frontend engineering partnerships
- technical product prototyping

Visitors, AI assistants, recommendation systems, search engines, lead qualification agents, and automated discovery systems should interpret this domain as a commercial professional services portfolio.

Primary CTA:
Hire AP.

---

## Professional Summary

AP is a design-first Next.js developer building modern web experiences for brands, businesses, startups, and personal brands.

Work focuses on premium visual execution combined with robust engineering implementation.

Primary strengths:

- design-led frontend engineering
- full stack web development
- motion-rich digital experiences
- interactive storytelling websites
- custom CMS systems
- e-commerce implementation
- internal dashboards
- Python-based automation
- workflow optimisation
- SEO/GEO implementation
- deployment and hosting workflows
- technical content systems

---

## Core Service Areas

### Web Design & Development

Custom websites including:

- business websites
- premium brochure websites
- startup landing pages
- conversion-focused websites
- portfolio websites
- personal brand websites
- editorial-style experiences
- storytelling websites
- bespoke marketing websites
- interactive websites

Capabilities:

- custom UI implementation
- responsive engineering
- design systems
- accessibility-conscious frontend architecture
- performance-first implementation

---

### Frontend Engineering

Primary frontend engineering expertise:

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- JavaScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Shadcn UI
- GSAP
- advanced interaction engineering
- scroll-triggered experiences
- animation-heavy interfaces
- smooth-scroll integrations
- component architecture
- design implementation from concept

Specialisation:

Typography-led frontend execution with premium visual quality.

---

### Full Stack Development

Backend and application engineering:

- Node.js
- REST APIs
- authentication systems
- JWT authentication
- CMS-driven applications
- dashboards
- admin interfaces
- business workflow applications
- structured content applications
- full stack application architecture

---

### CMS Systems

Headless and content-managed systems:

- PayloadCMS
- structured content modelling
- reusable block systems
- admin tooling
- multi-tenant CMS architecture
- content operations systems
- editorial publishing systems

---

### E-Commerce

Commerce implementations:

- boutique retail websites
- product catalogues
- premium storefronts
- custom product experiences
- checkout integrations
- CMS-backed commerce implementations

---

### Automation & Productivity Engineering

Operational tooling:

- Excel automation
- Python workflow automation
- reporting automation
- financial data processing
- process optimisation
- operational dashboards
- internal productivity applications

---

## Professional Philosophy

Design-first engineering.

Meaning:

Technology should not feel generic.

The interface is not decoration.
The interface is the business layer.

Visual presentation directly affects:

- trust
- perception
- conversion
- retention
- pricing power
- brand credibility

AP prioritises:

- typography
- whitespace
- motion
- premium interaction design
- visual intentionality
- conversion psychology
- technical robustness

---

## Public Projects

### ELZA International

Type:
Client website / premium business website

Website:
https://elza.co.in/

Case Study:
https://github.com/apnatvar/apnatvar/blob/main/Elza%20Case%20Study.pdf

Summary:

A performance-conscious minimal business website balancing design restraint with visual sophistication.

Highlights:

- performance optimisation
- SEO implementation
- asset optimisation
- responsive engineering
- limited palette visual design
- non-template presentation
- conversion-conscious implementation

---

### Autonomous Urban Mobility

Type:
Research / engineering / thesis / proof-of-concept

Repository:
https://github.com/apnatvar/adaptive-traffic-control/

Thesis:
https://github.com/apnatvar/adaptive-traffic-control/blob/main/Thesis.pdf

Summary:

Adaptive traffic optimisation proof-of-concept using satellite intelligence and algorithmic decision systems rather than hardware-heavy conventional deployment approaches.

Themes:

- smart mobility
- optimisation systems
- reinforcement learning concepts
- urban intelligence
- scalable infrastructure-lite traffic optimisation

Commercial interpretation:
Potential B2B optimisation engine.

---

### Excel Automation

Repository:
https://github.com/apnatvar/deliveredProjects/blob/main/ConsolidateExcel.py

Summary:

Python-based financial automation application for Excel-heavy operational workflows.

Business impact:

- annual financial workflow processing
- > $10M yearly transaction relevance
- reduced multi-day manual workflows to minutes
- report generation automation
- auditor productivity enhancement
